---
title: "The Rev. Bemjamin Thornton Dudley"
---

## The Rev. Bemjamin Thornton Dudley

**Dates:** (1838-1901)

### Description

missionary in Melanesia

### Biography

He was subsequently Archdeacon of Auckland.  See www.anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory/directory.pdf

### Letters

- Letter from May 6, 1862.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
